title: Eva Mobile game for Android iPhone
display_title: Eva Mobile game for Android iPhone
wikitext:
[]: Eva Mobile game for Android/iPhone             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 25, 2013 5:24 pm Info here: http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2013/09/25/neon-genesis-evangelion-mobile-game-launching-for-smartphones Rebuild-based, considering the Angels featured and the "Shikinami" for Asuka's last name. I guess nothing ever came out of this ? I wonder if this mobile game will be translated or if there's a way for international fans to show interest in it?

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Wed Sep 25, 2013 9:12 pm That reminds me, I need an iPad...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 29, 2013 9:57 pm Link to the mobile game website here, thanks Vince : Vince wrote: Hi guys, this is my first post and if it's true, I can't wait to play it! http://eva.bushimo.jp/

[]:             Quote Post by Vince » Mon Nov 18, 2013 5:22 pm This gives me new hope ^___^ [url]http://android-developers.blogspot.com/2013/11/app-translation-service-now-available.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by andreh » Mon Nov 18, 2013 10:38 pm Everyone forgets Windows Phone...

[]: [Merch] New videogame "Mobile Evangelion" for smar             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Mar 25, 2014 6:59 pm I don't know about you, but there's this videogame that keep being mentioned in Mina-no-Eva blog : http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2937.html It's a puzzle RPG & adventure for Android and iPhone, and apparently it have a number of "what if" scenarios : the two presented for the moment are one where Kaworu participate in operation Yashima, apparently with his Mark.06 if his plugsuit is to be believed (I almost pity Ramiel!), and another where Mari is having a conversation with someone she calls "Princess", meaning that here Mari and Asuka met much earlier than in canon. Another possibility about the latter scenario is that it happens during the time skip.

[]:             Quote Post by Erato » Tue Mar 25, 2014 7:27 pm Excuse me if it's a stupid question but... are the games considered canon ? If so, which ones are really important ? Au passage, ça fait plaisir de voir un français ici ;)

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Mar 25, 2014 10:48 pm Games aren't canon, no.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Mar 25, 2014 11:09 pm The games themselves may not be, but the CI was from NGE2 and it's generally considered second-tier canon.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Mar 25, 2014 11:13 pm Herp derp how could I not mention that. My bad.

[]: Hmm....             Quote Post by LMwanderer » Wed Mar 26, 2014 1:54 am So, is it safe to assume that this is the game that was mentioned at the Tokyo Game Show last year? And the new manga coming up mentioned it had something to do with 'Eva' x 'game. Rough estimate says these may be related spin offs as some sort of cross marketing campaign. That would explain while we haven't heard much of anything since last fall if the manga kicks off soon.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 26, 2014 2:05 am Merged with preexisting thread! Please use the search/threads feature!

[]: Re: Hmm....             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Mar 27, 2014 7:43 am LMwanderer wrote: So, is it safe to assume that this is the game that was mentioned at the Tokyo Game Show last year? And the new manga coming up mentioned it had something to do with 'Eva' x 'game. Rough estimate says these may be related spin offs as some sort of cross marketing campaign. That would explain while we haven't heard much of anything since last fall if the manga kicks off soon.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 23, 2014 4:24 pm Has anybody checked out this mobile game, or is it only in Japan (no way to access it otherwise)?

[]: new info             Quote Post by LMwanderer » Thu Sep 18, 2014 11:58 am Looks like a fall release. Actual new trailer. From one years tokyo game show to the next. [url]http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3282.html?sp[/url]
